app.title: OfficeCLI: Office suite for AI agents to read and edit Microsoft Office files
app.author: maxloh
app.description: Open-source toolkit to enable AI agents to work with MS Office documents.
proposed_tests: Install OfficeCLI and use its CLI for MS Office to JSON conversion
Test that OfficeCLI can edit MS Office files
